scope.summary: Reactions slice of rich-messages: render incoming reactions on chat bubbles, send reactions to messages. zca-rust already emits ListenerEvent::Reaction and exposes add_reaction API. Bridge the listener event to the UI, add send_reaction command, render reaction emoji on message bubbles.
goals: types/ ReactionEvent DTO (thread_id, msg_id, uid_from, d_name, r_icon emoji char, is_self) + ReactionIcon enum for send
zalo/: bridge ListenerEvent::Reaction in listener + wrap add_reaction API (zca-rust confined to zalo)
command/: send_reaction command (reuses session), Tauri event zalo://reaction for incoming
store/: persist reaction state on messages (reactions column or separate table)
Frontend: reaction emoji rendered below chat bubbles, reaction picker (long-press/tap), optimistic add
nonGoals: Custom reactions (standard Zalo emoji set only)

acceptance.description: cargo build compiles with the reaction DTOs, zalo bridge, and send_reaction command.
Offline unit tests for reaction icon mapping and listener bridge pass.
Frontend builds with reaction rendering on chat bubbles.
Live: incoming reaction renders + send_reaction delivers (Zalo returns msg_ids).
